title: Server Toolbox
description: 🧰 A server-side mod with complect of customizable commands and features to make your server neat. Inspired by Essentials, Essential Commands, plugins and etc.
body: #### 🧰 A server-side mod with complect of customizable commands and features to make your server neat. Inspired by Essentials, Essential Commands, plugins and etc. > ⚠️ This project is still in early stages of coding and some features are not tested completely, but you can help me with that by using this mod and reporting issues! ### Features - 📖 Over 20+ commands and counting! - ⚙️ Modular system with ability to disable unnecessary features. - 🖌 Customizable commands (with ability to disable them). - 🔐 Advanced permissions with subgroups. - 💬 Broadcaster for your automated messages. - 🚂 Spawn system with multiple dimensional spawns. - 📦 Kits with ability to add them ingame. - ✨ Built with Kotlin using Silk API. ### Languages - 🇬🇧 English - ...and more in the future!
